gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.translation) FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T2.setCode = T1.code WHERE T1.name = 'Tenth Edition' AND T2.translation IS NOT NULL
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T2.translation) FROM sets AS T1 INNER JOIN set_translations AS T2 ON T1.code = T2.setCode WHERE T1.name = 'Tenth Edition' AND T2.translation IS NOT NULL;
question: How many translations of the name of the set "Tenth Edition"?
